title: Sales Consultant (Medical Aesthetic)
description:
Sales Consultant – Medical Aesthetic Clinic Group (Singapore)

Monthly Income Potential: Up to S$8,000 or more

Job Highlights

  • Attractive salary & commission from S$4,000, with potential to exceed S$8,000 for candidates who fully meet our requirements.
  • Strong performers may achieve higher earnings within 3–6 months
  • Additional sales incentive overriders upon meeting targets
  • Structured training programme conducted by doctors and senior aestheticians
  • Training certificates recognised in Singapore
  • 5-day work week
  • Clinics located near MRT stations and city centres
  • Staff privileges on medical aesthetic treatments and products, up to S$6,000 per annum, selectable from a range of over 100 treatments

About the Role

SGP Healthcare Group is a medical aesthetic clinic group with established operations in Singapore and overseas presence in Shanghai, Hangzhou, and Kuala Lumpur.

We are expanding our frontline team and welcome sales professionals with a strong retail sales background who are keen to develop a long-term career in medical aesthetics. Prior aesthetic experience is an advantage, but comprehensive training is provided, making this role suitable for candidates transitioning from premiumretail, beauty, luxury, or service-based sales environments.

Key Responsibilities

  • Engage walk-in, call-in, and online enquiry customers, providing professional customer service before and after clinic visits
  • Work closely with medical doctors and aesthetic clinicians to support consultations for skin, body, and hair concerns
  • Explain treatment options, procedures, and products clearly and responsibly to clients
  • Conduct basic skin, body, and hair assessments in accordance with clinic protocols
  • Provide suitable recommendations based on individual client needs and clinical guidance
  • Support appointment scheduling, follow-ups, and customer communications via phone and digital platforms
  • Coordinate with internal teams on customer care and clinic operations
  • Assist with administrative duties related to customer management and clinic workflow

Role Requirements

  • Proven sales experience in retail, beauty, aesthetics, skincare, luxury, or service-based industries
  • Demonstrated ability to achieve consistent monthly sales performance (in-store or referral-based)
  • Minimum Diploma or equivalent qualification
  • Strong customer service mindset with professional communication skills
  • Comfortable working in a target-driven environment
  • Able to comply with clinic operational policies and ethical standards
  • Proficient in English, ability to communicate in Mandarin is preferred to support Mandarin-speaking clients
  • Willing to work retail hours, including weekends
  • Basic competency in using IT systems for daily operations

What We Offer

  • Clear career progression pathways within a growing medical aesthetic group
  • Structured onboarding and continuous training with certification
  • Supportive team environment with medical and management professionals
  • 5-day work week
  • Medical benefits
  • Staff privileges on medical aesthetic treatments and products, up to S$6,000 per annum, selectable from a range of over 100 treatments (applicable to full-time employees)

Complete the form before applying

https://forms.gle/BANHb1kAYwBY7k6D8

Pay package within the stated range will be commensurate with relevant experience and educational qualifications.

Please be advised that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.
